title: Salty Rainbow Trout Stew
description: A savory and juicy Chinese-inspired dish featuring rainbow trout braised in a low-carb-friendly sauce that's perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: Red Bell Peppers
ingredients.amount: 2 red bell peppers, seeded and chopped

instructions: Place trout fillets in a baking dish. Pour broth over the top.
Mix soy sauce, ginger, garlic, water chestnuts, and carrots into the liquid. Simmer for about 2 minutes on medium heat until the mixture is slightly thickened.
Pour the sauce evenly over the trout fillets. Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
Combine celery slices, red bell peppers, and green onions in a separate pan. Sauté for about 5 minutes until vegetables soften slightly.
Garnish baked trout with sautéed vegetables before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
